title: WAIC Major Achievements | Someone Finally Begins to Break the Computational Power Barrier: Shanghai Yidian Brings Together 23 Manufacturers to Set a Benchmark for the Domestic Intelligent Computing Foundation
excerpt: The ambition of a city's computing power is rarely written in a PPT, but rather on a practical specification. On July 21st, under the spotlight of the 2026 Worl
content_html:
The ambition of a city's computing power is rarely written in a PPT, but rather on a practical specification. On July 21st, under the spotlight of the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference, Shanghai Yidian Zhi'sai took the initiative to do something that the industry has long called for but no one had taken the lead on: it jointly established the Intelligent Computing System Architecture Alliance with more than 20 upstream and downstream industry chain entities including GPU chip, interconnection, system integration, large model, and software sectors. At the same time, the alliance released its first achievement, "The Super Node System Architecture Specification." The Shanghai Municipal Commission of Economy and Information Technology stood as an advisory unit, while the Yidian-Zhongxing Joint Laboratory took over the daily operations.

Intelligent computing power has long been the heart of the digital economy, but this heart does not beat smoothly. There is a mismatch between the supply and demand of computing resources, and there are high walls of compatibility between software and hardware. Even the strongest single point cannot build a complete network. As a core enterprise of the Shanghai Intelligent Computing Public Service Platform, Shanghai Yidian has invested a lot of effort in the infrastructure in recent years: several intelligent computing centers have been completed, dozens of domestic AI core components have passed testing and verification, more than a hundred test reports have been accumulated, and the Yidian Intelligent Computing Cloud Platform was independently developed, which has truly made the unified management and intelligent scheduling of heterogeneous computing power work effectively. The mission of the alliance is thus clearly defined: to gather the full-stack ecosystem and build an intelligent computing system architecture, and to practice the responsibility of state-owned enterprises to create an autonomous and controllable infrastructure. It provides systematic and integrated planning and construction solutions for scenarios such as intelligent computing centers, supercomputing clusters, and industry computing bases, rather than another conceptual blueprint.

The value of the alliance lies in its member list. Led by Yidian Zhi'sai, it is backed by 23 manufacturers covering the entire industrial chain: Stepwise Star, Xiyu Technology, Tiangshu Zhixin, Biren Technology, Pingtouge, Hanwuji, Eastern Computing Chip, Muxi Co., Ltd., Suiyuan Technology, Silang Technology, ZTE Communications, HuaXin San, Inspur Group, Suanfeng Information, Sunlight Information, Xizhi Technology, YuXun Network, Qingcheng Jizhi, Qujing Technology, Jiliu Technology, Silicon Flow, Yunmiecunlian, and Yunhezhiwang. From the underlying chips all the way up to the application layer, the purpose of this collaboration chain is clear: to combine heterogeneous computing power and technical resources into one force, break through the computing power barriers, and promote the compatibility and coordination of software and hardware. For alliance members, this membership ticket offers three tangible benefits: participating in the discussion and preparation of industry standards such as the super node construction specifications, using the real machine testing and verification environment of the alliance to efficiently complete compatibility and optimization, shortening the R&D iteration cycle, and leveraging the platform to connect leading enterprises and national-level laboratories to carry out joint research on cutting-edge technologies, co-apply for major scientific research projects and demonstration engineering, and accurately connect the supply and demand of the industrial chain.

What truly transforms the alliance from a loose coalition into a binding constraint is the simultaneously released "Super Node System Architecture Specification" version 1.0. This specification is divided into hardware and software. On the hardware side, it specifies the use of cold plate liquid-cooled rack-mounted cabinets, uniform node dimensions, and blind insertion of electrical, liquid, and network three bus lines for front maintenance. It also includes centralized power supply, liquid cooling, and leak detection isolation. It completes the Scale-up deployment through high-speed interconnection backplanes—effectively setting a common physical language for machines from different manufacturers to be compatible and stable. On the software side, it clearly outlines requirements for operation and maintenance management, cluster integration and topology awareness scheduling, collective communication, storage and data loading, security and trustworthiness, and conformity acceptance, ensuring that upper-level scheduling follows clear guidelines. Shanghai Yidian has clearly stated that it will strictly follow this specification to build its own super node cluster.

sentences.zh: 对于联盟成员来说，这张会员券可以带来三大实实在在的好处：参与超级节点建设规范等行业标准的讨论和制定，利用联盟的实机测试验证环境高效完成兼容性和优化，缩短研发迭代周期，利用平台连接龙头企业和国家级实验室开展前沿技术联合攻关，共同申报重大科研项目和示范工程，精准对接产业链供需。

sentences.en: What truly transforms the alliance from a loose coalition into a binding constraint is the simultaneously released "Super Node System Architecture Specification" version 1.0.
sentences.zh: 真正将联盟从松散联盟转变为约束约束的是同步发布的《超级节点系统架构规范》1.0版本。

sentences.en: This specification is divided into hardware and software.
sentences.zh: 该规范分为硬件和软件。

sentences.en: On the hardware side, it specifies the use of cold plate liquid-cooled rack-mounted cabinets, uniform node dimensions, and blind insertion of electrical, liquid, and network three bus lines for front maintenance.
sentences.zh: 硬件方面，规定采用冷板液冷机架式机柜，统一节点尺寸，电气、液体、网络三总线盲插进行前维护。

sentences.en: It also includes centralized power supply, liquid cooling, and leak detection isolation.
sentences.zh: 它还包括集中供电、液体冷却和泄漏检测隔离。

sentences.en: It completes the Scale-up deployment through high-speed interconnection backplanes—effectively setting a common physical language for machines from different manufacturers to be compatible and stable.
sentences.zh: 通过高速互联背板完成Scale-up部署，有效为不同厂家的机器建立了通用的物理语言，实现兼容和稳定。

sentences.en: On the software side, it clearly outlines requirements for operation and maintenance management, cluster integration and topology awareness scheduling, collective communication, storage and data loading, security and trustworthiness, and conformity acceptance, ensuring that upper-level scheduling follows clear guidelines.
sentences.zh: 软件方面，明确了运维管理、集群集成和拓扑感知调度、集中通信、存储和数据加载、安全可信、一致性验收等要求，确保上层调度有明确的指引。

sentences.en: Shanghai Yidian has clearly stated that it will strictly follow this specification to build its own super node cluster.
sentences.zh: 上海一点已经明确表示将严格按照这一规范打造自己的超级节点集群。

content_html_zh:
一个城市计算能力的野心很少写在PPT中，而是写在实际的规范上。 7月21日，在2026世界人工智能大会的聚光灯下，上海一点智赛主动做了一件业界呼吁已久但无人带头的事：联合GPU芯片、互联、系统集成、大模型、软件等20多家上下游产业链主体共同成立智能计算系统架构联盟。 同时，联盟发布了首个成果《超级节点系统架构规范》。 上海市经济和信息化委员会作为顾问单位，一点-中兴联合实验室承担日常运作。

智能算力长期以来一直是数字经济的心脏，但这颗心脏并不平稳跳动。 计算资源供需不匹配，软件和硬件兼容性存在高墙。 即使是最强的单点也无法构建完整的网络。 作为上海智能计算公共服务平台的核心企业，上海一点在基础设施方面投入了大量的精力：多个智能计算中心已建成，数十个国产AI核心部件通过测试验证，积累了百余份测试报告，自主研发了一点智能计算云平台，真正让异构算力的统一管理和智能调度有效发挥作用。 联盟的使命由此明确：汇聚全栈生态，构建智能计算系统架构，践行国企责任，打造自主可控基础设施。 它为智能计算中心、超算集群、行业计算基地等场景提供系统化、一体化的规划建设解决方案，而不是另一个概念蓝图。

联盟的价值在于其成员名单。 Led by Yidian Zhi'sai, it is backed by 23 manufacturers covering the entire industrial chain: Stepwise Star, Xiyu Technology, Tiangshu Zhixin, Biren Technology, Pingtouge, Hanwuji, Eastern Computing Chip, Muxi Co., Ltd., Suiyuan Technology, Silang Technology, ZTE Communications, HuaXin San, Inspur Group, Suanfeng Information, Sunlight Information, Xizhi Technology, YuXun Network, Qingcheng Jizhi, Qujing Technology, Jiliu Technology, Silicon Flow, Yunmiecunlian, and Yunhezhiwang. 从底层芯片一直到应用层，这条协同链的目的很明确：将异构算力和技术资源合二为一，突破算力壁垒，促进软硬件的兼容和协同。 对于联盟成员来说，这张会员券可以带来三大实实在在的好处：参与超级节点建设规范等行业标准的讨论和制定，利用联盟的实机测试验证环境高效完成兼容性和优化，缩短研发迭代周期，利用平台连接龙头企业和国家级实验室开展前沿技术联合攻关，共同申报重大科研项目和示范工程，精准对接产业链供需。

真正将联盟从松散联盟转变为约束约束的是同步发布的《超级节点系统架构规范》1.0版本。 该规范分为硬件和软件。 硬件方面，规定采用冷板液冷机架式机柜，统一节点尺寸，电气、液体、网络三总线盲插进行前维护。 它还包括集中供电、液体冷却和泄漏检测隔离。 通过高速互联背板完成Scale-up部署，有效为不同厂家的机器建立了通用的物理语言，实现兼容和稳定。 软件方面，明确了运维管理、集群集成和拓扑感知调度、集中通信、存储和数据加载、安全可信、一致性验收等要求，确保上层调度有明确的指引。 上海一点已经明确表示将严格按照这一规范打造自己的超级节点集群。
